SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client

Class ClientRMI

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientConnectionInterface, RMIClientSkeleton, ClientInterface, Serializable, Remote
public class ClientRMI extends UnicastRemoteObject implements RMIClientSkeleton, ClientConnectionInterface
the ClientRMI class implements the RMIClientSkeleton and implements the method called by the player during the game.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ClientRMI

      public ClientRMI(String ip, int port, View v) throws RemoteException
      ClientRMI is a setter method for the server's port and ip, and the for the view.
      Parameters:
      ip - is the server's ip.
      port - is the server's port.
      v - is the view.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

  • Method Details

    • startClient

      public void startClient() throws RemoteException
      the startClient method implements the usage of the method from the ClientConnectionInterface.
      Specified by:
      startClient in interface ClientConnectionInterface
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateLobbyView

      public void updateLobbyView(String yourNickname, List<String> playerNickname, int lobbyNum, int totalPlayers) throws RemoteException
      the updateLobbyView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      updateLobbyView in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      yourNickname - is the player receiving the message.
      playerNickname - is the list of players in the lobby.
      lobbyNum - is the number of players in the lobby.
      totalPlayers - is the maximum number of players the lobby can contain.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • receiveLobbies

      public void receiveLobbies(ArrayList<Integer> Lobbies) throws RemoteException
      the receiveLobbies method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      receiveLobbies in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      Lobbies - is the list of Lobbies.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • playerAdded

      public void playerAdded(String player) throws RemoteException
      the playerAdded method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      playerAdded in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      player - is the player added.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateInitialPhase

      public void updateInitialPhase(List<Integer> availableGold, List<Integer> availableResource, int startCard, List<Integer> hand, List<Integer> publicObjectives, List<Integer> privateObjectives, Resource goldDeckBack, Resource resourceDeckBack) throws RemoteException
      the sendInitial method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      updateInitialPhase in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      availableGold - is the list of available gold cards the player can draw.
      availableResource - is the list of available resource cards the player can draw.
      startCard - is the player's starting card.
      hand - is the player's hand.
      publicObjectives - is the public objectives the player has to complete.
      privateObjectives - is the private objectives the player has to choose from.
      goldDeckBack - is the top of the gold deck from which the player can draw.
      resourceDeckBack - is the top of the gold deck from which the player can draw.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • sendNowUnavailableToken

      public void sendNowUnavailableToken(String player, Token token) throws RemoteException
      the nowUnavailableToken method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      sendNowUnavailableToken in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      player - is the player choosing the token.
      token - is the token chosen.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • sendPlayersInOrder

      public void sendPlayersInOrder(List<String> playersInOrder)
      the sendPlayersInOrder method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      sendPlayersInOrder in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      playersInOrder - is the ordered list of the players.

    • notifyPlayer

      public void notifyPlayer(String message) throws RemoteException
      the notifyPlayer method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      notifyPlayer in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      message - is the message notified to the player.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateKingdom

      public void updateKingdom(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos) throws RemoteException
      the updatesPlayersKingdomView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      updateKingdom in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      player - is the player who places the card.
      cardId - is the cardId of the card to be placed.
      side - is the side of the card to be placed.
      pos - is the position where the player wants to place the card.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateHandAndDeckView

      public void updateHandAndDeckView(String deck, Resource resource, int cardId) throws RemoteException
      the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      updateHandAndDeckView in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      resource - is the new top of the deck requested.
      cardId - is the card the player has drawn and that now is in his hand.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateDeckView

      public void updateDeckView(String deck, Resource resource) throws RemoteException
      the updatesDeckView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      updateDeckView in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      resource - is the top of the deck requested.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • updateAvailable

      public void updateAvailable(String deck, Resource topOfDeck, String availableChanged, List<Integer> available) throws RemoteException
      the updatesAvailableCardView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      updateAvailable in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      deck - is a parameter which gives information about the nature of the deck, if it's gold or resource.
      topOfDeck - is the resource of the new top of the deck requested.
      availableChanged - is the new available card that has changed.
      available - is the new list of the available cards on the field.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

    • showResults

      public void showResults(Map<String,Integer> playerPoints, Map<String,Integer> playerNumCompletedObjectives) throws RemoteException
      the sendResults method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
      Specified by:
      showResults in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      playerPoints - is a map of each player's points.
      playerNumCompletedObjectives - is a map of the number of objectives completed by each player.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.

      public void errorMessage(String description) throws RemoteException
      the error message method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.

      errorMessage in interface RMIClientSkeleton
      Parameters:
      description - is the message sent.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - when the connection is lost.
